summary: Backend-only smoke test for Du'Spicci v3. All 21 checks passed (auth+profile, geo/counts/coords, jobs centroid fill, applications lifecycle pending/accept/reject, dedup, ownership checks, 48h thread creation, messages w/ participant guard, Mancia removal).
passed: POST /api/auth/register accepts first_name/last_name/age/photo; returns UserPublic with those fields (no password_hash)
GET /api/users/{id} returns public profile (no password_hash leak)
POST /api/jobs fills lat/lng from quartiere centroid when not provided (Parioli => 41.921, 12.494)
Duplicate apply by same user returns same record (no dup)
POST apply ignores extra tip/mancia body fields
GET /api/applications/inbox returns apps to my jobs
POST /api/applications/{id}/accept by owner creates thread, status=accepted, returns thread_id
GET /api/threads returns my threads with expires_at + expired bool
POST /api/threads/{id}/messages works for owner AND applicant
notes: Test domain '.test' is reserved by pydantic EmailStr — used @duspicci.it for test accounts. Backend correctly rejects reserved TLDs in registration.
